# ChatKit Pull Request

## 1. Summary
- What problem does this PR solve? What does it change?

## 2. Scope
- Type: [ ] Feature [ ] Fix [ ] Docs [ ] Chore [ ] Breaking change
- Areas touched: [ ] SDK [ ] UI [ ] Web components [ ] Widgets [ ] Examples [ ] Docs

## 3. Testing
- Steps/commands run:
- Results:

## 4. Risks & Impact
- Breaking changes or migrations? If yes, describe.
- External API/schema changes? If yes, list the surface.

## 5. Documentation
- Docs or guides updated/added? If not needed, state why.

## 6. Checklist
- [ ] Added/updated tests where sensible
- [ ] Verified lint/build locally
- [ ] Updated types and public interfaces if changed
- [ ] Added screenshots/GIFs for UI changes
